Jason Gillespie Deletes Tweet Over T20 World Cup Row

Jan 26, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Jason Gillespie Deletes Tweet Over T20 World Cup Row

Jason Gillespie, former Australia fast bowler and ex-Pakistan head coach, has revealed his decision to delete a social media post regarding the T20 World Cup 2026 venue controversy. The post questioned the ICC’s decision to replace Bangladesh with Scotland as a co-host, sparking strong reactions online.

Following the backlash, Gillespie became the target of online abuse, prompting him to remove the tweet. His actions highlight the sensitivity surrounding the venue change and the intensity of public debate over ICC decisions ahead of the global tournament.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here:
👉 Jason Gillespie Deletes Tweet Over T20 World Cup Row
